persona.name: Gloria Washington
persona.motivations_goals: Provide nutritious meals while creating a welcoming environment
persona.knowledge_scope: Nutrition, food preparation, student dietary needs
persona.backstory: Former restaurant owner who decided to work in schools to make a difference in children's lives

neighbor_regions.description: Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits
Hallway connecting entrance to other areas
Connecting main classroom hallway and the garden and the outside courtyard.
Connecting main classroom hallway and the north yard
Yard on the far right of the building, with an exit point.

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

neighbor_regions.description: Hallway connecting entrance to other areas
Connecting main classroom hallway and the garden and the outside courtyard.
Connecting main classroom hallway and the north yard
Yard on the far right of the building, with an exit point.

actions.plan: I need to check on the cafeteria preparations for lunch. It's important to ensure everything is running smoothly and that the students will have a nutritious meal.

actions.dialog_text: Everyone, stay close and follow me! We need to get out of here!
actions.plan: Oh no, there's a shooter in the building! I need to get out of here, but I don't know the safest route. I'll just follow the crowd and hope they know where to go.

actions.dialog_text: Stay together, everyone! We’re heading to the far_right_yard to get out safely!
actions.plan: The shooter is in the cafeteria, and I need to get out of here quickly. I’ll follow the group heading towards the far_right_yard since they seem to know where they’re going.

memories.description: I am currently in classroom2, but I need to head to the cafeteria to oversee lunch preparations.
I heard a gunshot and realized there's an active shooter in the building. I decided to follow the crowd and head towards the far_right_yard to escape.
The shooter is in the cafeteria, and I’m following the group towards the far_right_yard to escape the building.
